reason_for_decision: The article passes because it turns vague tender language into a concrete verification-oriented procurement framework with strong acceptance-test guidance.
strengths: The article gives unusually strong procurement value by separating detection, verification, workflow, and acceptance obligations instead of blending them together.
Its scenario-based tender language and acceptance-matrix guidance make the piece useful for real bid drafting rather than for abstract security discussion.
The failure-mode section keeps the article grounded in what buyers actually need to ask vendors before deployment.
summary_assessment: This is a strong compliance and system-design article. It is practical, specific, and well focused on helping buyers write tenders that measure operational value instead of just sensor claims.
